extractionRules: Always read this authority index before interpreting any individual global-context registry.
Resolve hierarchy and cross-cutting facets together; neither a facet nor a legacy family alone is a complete student-visible scenario.
Use the fused population index and read-only resolver to materialize the bootstrap macro, meso, micro, atomic, and surface layers.
Treat the GS02 registry as a legacy flat seed source, not as the complete global-context universe.
Do not use the count of legacy contextFamilies as the total scenario capacity.
Do not count surface templates, changed nouns, changed names, or changed numbers as new ontology nodes.
Do not infer a legacy contextFamilyId hierarchy level without the explicit mapping registry.
Select application contexts at ATOMIC_TASK_EPISODE level after KnowledgePoint, operation model, application capability, and affordance matching.
Use CURRENT_AFFAIRS_SOURCE_REQUIRED only with an admitted source anchor, validity window, current-affairs facet, and current-snapshot freshness facet.
M01 bootstrap nodes are connectable candidates but are not production admitted.
The ontology remains extensible; bootstrap population completion does not mean the global context universe is closed.
prohibitedInferences: 18 legacy context families equals 18 total student-visible contexts
54 surface templates equals the maximum scenario capacity
every legacy context family is automatically a macro domain
SDG, ancient, historical, or current-affairs labels automatically create a new hierarchy node
a wording variant creates a new semantic scenario
a number-only or noun-only change creates a new atomic episode
bootstrap population means the global context universe is complete
a current-affairs theme authorizes copying realtime statistics into general generated items

currentAuthorityState.safeSummary: A fused and queryable bootstrap now combines hierarchy with SDG, temporal, geography, theme, and freshness facets. All 18 legacy families map explicitly. Application binding migration and production admission remain incomplete.
